name: claude-mem
description: Persistent Context Across Sessions for Every Agent – Captures everything your agent does during sessions, compresses it with AI, and injects relevant context back into future sessions. Works with Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, Gemini, Hermes, Copilot, OpenCode + More

name: zeroclaw
description: Fast, small, and fully autonomous AI personal assistant infrastructure, ANY OS, ANY PLATFORM — deploy anywhere, swap anything 🦀

name: awesome-openclaw-usecases
description: A community collection of OpenClaw use cases for making life easier.

name: linclaw
description: the first mobile app built for OpenClaw — turning your phone into a real-time control center for AI digital workers. No terminal, no code, no jargon.
